stories.headline: UK growth forecast upgraded by IMF but 'risks' remain
stories.description: Growth has been upgraded from 0.8% to 1% for 2026 in the influential body's latest forecast.

stories.headline: Cruise hit by hantavirus outbreak docks in Rotterdam, final destination
stories.description: The ship's crew are expected to self-isolate after arriving at the Dutch port, their final destination.

stories.headline: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
stories.description: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.

stories.headline: Israeli forces boarding Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
stories.description: Israeli forces board Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, halting blockade breach.

stories.headline: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
stories.description: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
